The specific claim of "8-12% of construction for architecture/engineering" does not appear in accessible Denver building code documents or official sources, though industry standards suggest lower percentages (2-5% for architecture, 1-3% for engineering).

While Denver does charge permits, fees, and impact fees, the search results do not contain an authoritative source explicitly stating a combined 2-4% of construction cost figure for all three categories together.

No Denver Building Code section or official policy establishes a "1-2% of construction cost" requirement for testing/inspection; the code instead requires inspections based on work type, not cost percentage.

The Denver Building Code does not contain a requirement for "5-10% of construction for contingency" as a mandatory code provision; this appears to be industry best practice presented as a code requirement.
